title: Tampere Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Tampere with a Z-Score of -3.03. This event has a Score of 10.0/10, classified as CRITICAL.
body:
The current weather conditions in Tampere are extremely cold, with a significant impact on the city's infrastructure. The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is at 11.6 GG, indicating a high demand for heating. 
 The relative humidity is at 55%, and the wind speed is at 17.6 km/h, making the cold feel even more intense. 
 The cold snap is expected to continue, with no Cooling Degree Days (CDD) recorded, and the city's residents are advised to take necessary precautions.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take immediate action to mitigate the effects of the cold snap.
